themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: President Donald Trump's state visit to China and his administration's policies, including trade negotiations, Iran strategy, and domestic economic measures, have dominated right-wing media narratives across multiple countries. This theme reflects a transnational focus on Trump's influence and the perceived impact of his leadership on global affairs.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Extensive coverage of Trump's China visit, trade talks with Xi Jinping, and domestic policies like Medicaid fraud crackdowns and gas tax proposals.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Focus on Trump's foreign policy, particularly his stance on NATO and U.S.-Poland relations, as well as his influence on Polish domestic politics.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Coverage of Trump's economic policies and their implications for Italy, including trade and energy security discussions.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Emphasis on Trump's alignment with Javier Milei's libertarian policies and the broader impact of Trumpism on Argentine politics.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Discussion of Trump's foreign policy as a model for France's right-wing, particularly in relation to immigration and national sovereignty.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Analysis of Trump's policies as a blueprint for Reform UK's platform, particularly on immigration and economic nationalism.

themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe and the Americas are increasingly advocating for 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to social services, housing, and employment. This theme highlights a shared rhetorical and policy framework aimed at addressing perceived threats to national identity and welfare systems.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox's campaign in Andalusia emphasizes 'national priority' in healthcare, housing, and social benefits, targeting illegal immigration as a key issue.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government promotes policies favoring Italian citizens in welfare and housing, aligning with nationalist rhetoric.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Advocacy for prioritizing Swedish citizens in social services and housing, with a focus on reducing immigration.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Marine Le Pen's party pushes for policies that prioritize French citizens in employment and welfare, criticizing mass immigration.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Focus on restricting immigration and prioritizing Norwegian citizens in access to social services and jobs.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Javier Milei's government promotes policies that prioritize Argentine citizens in economic benefits, aligning with nationalist rhetoric.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption allegations and scandals involving high-ranking officials in far-right governments have become a dominant theme in right-wing media. These scandals are framed as either politically motivated attacks or evidence of systemic corruption, depending on the narrative. This theme reflects a transnational pattern of political instability and public distrust in far-right administrations.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Scandals involving Manuel Adorni and his brother, including allegations of illicit enrichment and money laundering, dominate coverage.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Coverage of corruption allegations against Orbán's government, including misuse of EU funds and luxury spending by officials.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Scandals involving Zbigniew Ziobro and other PiS officials, including allegations of embezzlement and abuse of power.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Allegations of corruption within Vox's leadership, including misuse of campaign funds and internal power struggles.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Coverage of Trump administration officials facing corruption allegations, including Howard Lutnick and Kash Patel.

themes.title: Reform UK’s electoral surge reshapes UK politics
themes.blurb: Reform UK's unprecedented gains in local elections have reshaped the UK's political landscape, challenging the dominance of the Conservative and Labour parties. This theme reflects a broader transnational trend of far-right parties gaining electoral traction and influencing mainstream political discourse, particularly on issues like immigration and economic nationalism.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK's electoral success in local elections, including gains in Worcestershire, Essex, and Bradford, dominates coverage.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Analysis of Reform UK's rise as a model for Trump-aligned movements in the U.S., particularly on immigration and anti-establishment rhetoric.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Coverage of Reform UK's electoral strategies and their potential impact on Italy's right-wing parties.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Discussion of Reform UK's success as a blueprint for Vox's electoral strategies in Spain.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Analysis of Reform UK's rise as a potential model for France's far-right, particularly on immigration and economic policies.

themes.title: Far-right parties exploit immigration tensions
themes.blurb: Immigration remains a central issue for far-right parties, who are leveraging public anxieties over border security, cultural integration, and economic impact to mobilize voters. This theme highlights a shared rhetorical strategy across multiple countries, where immigration is framed as an existential threat to national identity and social cohesion.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox's campaign in Andalusia focuses on immigration as a key issue, linking it to crime and social instability.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Marine Le Pen's party emphasizes immigration control as a central policy, criticizing Macron's handling of border security.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD's platform centers on restricting immigration and opposing multiculturalism, with a focus on national identity.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK's electoral success is driven by anti-immigration rhetoric, particularly targeting illegal immigration and asylum seekers.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: FrP's policies focus on reducing immigration and prioritizing Norwegian citizens in social services and employment.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government promotes stricter immigration controls, aligning with nationalist rhetoric on cultural preservation.
